description: Fix all bugs from Drue's testing of Support Centre, Docs, and AI Chat: markdown rendering, text overflow, missing navigation, DOM warnings, duplicate messages, profile photos, and CORS error.

userStories.title: Fix TableOfContents Text Overflow & Duplicate Keys
userStories.description: As a user reading docs, I want the 'On this page' sidebar to display properly without text going off-screen.
acceptanceCriteria: TOC items truncate with ellipsis when text exceeds container width
Duplicate heading slugs get unique keys (append -N suffix for duplicates)
No 'Encountered two children with the same key' warning in console
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Add Back Button to Support Page
userStories.description: As a user on the Support Centre page, I want a back/home button so I can navigate away.
acceptanceCriteria: Back arrow button in hero area navigates to previous page or dashboard
Uses ArrowLeft icon from lucide-react
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Render Markdown in AI Chat Responses
userStories.description: As a user chatting with the AI assistant, I want responses to render bold text, lists, and paragraphs properly instead of raw markdown.
acceptanceCriteria: Assistant messages use ReactMarkdown with remarkGfm
**bold** renders as bold, lists render as lists, paragraphs have spacing
Styling matches existing chat bubble theme
Links open in new tab with rel='noopener noreferrer'
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175
userStories.notes: File: src/components/support/SupportAIChat.tsx line 111. react-markdown already installed.

userStories.title: Fix Suggested Questions Double-Send Bug
userStories.description: As a user clicking a suggested question in the hero, the AI chat should send exactly one message, not two.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace initialQuerySent state with ref tracking last sent query string
Clicking a suggested question sends exactly 1 message
Clicking a different suggested question also sends exactly 1 message
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix Duplicate Key Warning on Source Articles
userStories.description: As a developer, the SupportAIChat should not produce React key warnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Source article links use ${article.slug}-${index} as key
No 'Each child in a list should have a unique key' warning in console
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add User Profile Photos to Ticket Conversation
userStories.description: As a user viewing a support ticket conversation, I want to see real profile photos and proper sender labels.
acceptanceCriteria: User messages show avatar_url from profiles table (fallback to initials)
Agent messages show 'System Administrator' label
Agent messages use Shield icon instead of generic Bot icon
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

userStories.title: Fix SlackChannelSelector Nested Button Warning
userStories.description: As a developer, the SlackChannelSelector should not produce DOM nesting warnings.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear (X) button changed from <button> to <span role='button'>
No 'button cannot appear as descendant of button' warning in console
Clear functionality still works
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix Support Ticket Email CORS Error
userStories.description: As a user creating a support ticket, the email notification should not fail with a CORS error.
acceptanceCriteria: Add send-support-ticket-email to supabase/config.toml with verify_jwt = false
Email notification fires without CORS error
Ticket still creates successfully even if email fails
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: File: supabase/config.toml. Needs deployment after change.

userStories.title: Add User ID Filter to Support Tickets Query
userStories.description: As a defense-in-depth measure, the support tickets query should explicitly filter by user_id.
acceptanceCriteria: useSupportTickets hook adds .eq('user_id', user.id) to query
Users only see their own tickets
Typecheck passes
